## Observations & Notes

### 📌 Note 1 — DEMO_MODE isolation verified
The `DEMO_MODE` flag correctly isolates mock token acceptance. When `DEMO_MODE=false`, mock tokens are rejected with 401. **This is critical for production deployment.**  
→ Recommend: Add `DEMO_MODE` to production deployment checklist.

### 📌 Note 2 — Loading time within spec
Google login redirect to dashboard takes ~1.2 seconds in demo environment (spec: < 3 seconds). 

### 📌 Note 3 — Screen reader compatibility
Error banner uses `role="alert"`, tested with basic screen reader simulation. Full accessibility audit recommended before production.
